title: clematis triphylla
intro: Clematis triphylla, also known as Clematis armandii, is a type of evergreen flowering vine native to China, characterized by its white, fragrant flowers and glossy green leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. It has been used to treat a variety of health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, and has also been used to reduce stress and promote relaxation. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are said to have a range of health benefits, including improving circulation and reducing anxiety.
